title: 「Had better」句型
titleEn: Using Had better for strong advice or a warning

source.file: Sentence Sturcture 28 -「Had better」表示強烈建議或警告.pdf
omissions: English translations for Chinese-only teaching explanations are editorial; English content already present in the PDF is retained.
The PDF supplies the lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.

formula: Subject + had better + base verb + other information

formulas.formula: Subject + had better + base verb + other information
Subject + had better not + base verb + other information

example: You had better save a copy.

examples.en: You had better save a copy.

meaning.en: Had better gives strong or urgent advice and often implies that a problem may occur if the advice is not followed.
meaning.zh: Had better 表示較強烈或較緊急的建議，並通常暗示如果不照做，可能會出現問題。

benefits.en: It shows that the advice is serious and should be considered carefully.
benefits.zh: 讓對方立即明白這項建議並不是普通意見，而是需要認真考慮的提醒。

benefits.en: It can warn people about a possible problem and is particularly useful for warnings, safety reminders and urgent advice.
benefits.zh: 可以警告可能出現的問題，特別適合提出警告、安全提醒和緊急建議。

benefits.en: It can make a warning shorter and more direct.
benefits.zh: 可以用較短和直接的方式表達強烈建議。

benefits.en: It helps you choose the correct strength of advice by distinguishing ordinary advice, strong advice or warning, and a rule or requirement.
benefits.zh: 幫助選擇正確的建議強度，分辨普通建議、強烈建議或警告，以及規則或必要要求。

benefits.en: It is useful in everyday situations such as conversations, messages, work reminders, travel arrangements, health advice and safety warnings.
benefits.zh: 適合日常對話、短訊、工作提醒、旅遊安排、健康建議和安全警告。

rules.en: Use the base form of the verb after had better. Do not add to.
rules.zh: Had better 後面使用動詞原形，不可加入 to。
examples: Correct: You had better leave now.
Incorrect: You had better to leave now.

rules.en: The negative form is had better not + base verb, not had not better.
rules.zh: 否定式是 had better not + 動詞原形，不是 had not better。
examples: You had better not touch the pan.

rules.en: Had does not indicate past time. Had better normally refers to an action that should be taken now or in the near future.
rules.zh: had 不表示過去時間；had better 通常表示現在或不久將來應該採取的行動。
examples: You had better call her now.

rules.en: Had better is stronger than should. Should normally gives general advice, whereas had better gives stronger or more urgent advice and often implies a possible problem if it is ignored.
rules.zh: Had better 比 should 更強烈。should 通常表示一般建議；had better 表示較強烈或較緊急的建議，並通常暗示如果不照做，可能會出現問題。
examples: You had better check your work, or you may lose marks.

rules.en: Had better is not the same as must: should gives ordinary advice, had better gives strong advice or a warning, and must states a rule, command or necessary requirement.
rules.zh: Had better 與 must 不完全相同：should 表示一般或較溫和的建議；had better 表示強烈建議或警告；must 表示規則、命令或必要要求。
examples: You must show your passport at immigration.

rules.en: Had better is normally used for a specific immediate or upcoming situation. Should is usually more suitable for general or long-term advice.
rules.zh: Had better 多用於眼前或即將發生的具體情況；表達一般或長期建議時，should 通常較合適。
examples: You had better take an umbrella. It is going to rain.

rules.en: Had better can sound strong, like a warning or command. Use it carefully with strangers, customers or supervisors so that the tone does not seem too forceful.
rules.zh: Had better 的語氣可能較強，有時像警告或命令；與陌生人、顧客或上司說話時應小心使用，以免顯得過於強硬。

rules.en: Had better may be contracted to ’d better in speech, but this exercise consistently uses the full form had better.
rules.zh: 口語中 had better 可以縮寫為 ’d better，但本練習統一使用完整形式 had better。

sourceOmissions: English translations for Chinese-only teaching explanations are editorial; English content already present in the PDF is retained.
The PDF supplies the lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.

en: Rewrite each sentence using had better to give strong advice or a warning. Use had better not when the advice is negative.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 had better 改寫以下句子，以提出強烈建議或警告。需要表達「最好不要」時，使用 had better not。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: You should save a copy, or you may lose your work.
questions.promptZh: 你應該儲存一份副本，否則可能會遺失你的工作內容。
questions.answer: You had better save a copy, or you may lose your work.
questions.answerZh: 你最好儲存一份副本，否則可能會遺失你的工作內容。
questions.highlight: You had better save a copy, or you may lose your work.

questions.prompt: It would be wise to take an umbrella because heavy rain is expected.
questions.promptZh: 由於預計會下大雨，帶一把雨傘會較明智。
questions.answer: You had better take an umbrella because heavy rain is expected.
questions.answerZh: 你最好帶一把雨傘，因為預計會下大雨。
questions.highlight: You had better take an umbrella because heavy rain is expected.

questions.prompt: You should leave now, or you may miss the bus.
questions.promptZh: 你應該現在離開，否則可能會錯過巴士。
questions.answer: You had better leave now, or you may miss the bus.
questions.answerZh: 你最好現在離開，否則可能會錯過巴士。
questions.highlight: You had better leave now, or you may miss the bus.

questions.prompt: The best thing to do is charge your phone before the trip.
questions.promptZh: 最好的做法是在旅程前為手機充電。
questions.answer: You had better charge your phone before the trip.
questions.answerZh: 你最好在旅程前為手機充電。
questions.highlight: You had better charge your phone before the trip.

questions.prompt: You are strongly advised to wear a coat because it is very cold outside.
questions.promptZh: 外面非常寒冷，因此強烈建議你穿上外套。
questions.answer: You had better wear a coat because it is very cold outside.
questions.answerZh: 你最好穿上外套，因為外面非常寒冷。
questions.highlight: You had better wear a coat because it is very cold outside.

questions.prompt: You should check the address before sending the parcel, or it may go to the wrong place.
questions.promptZh: 你應該在寄出包裹前核對地址，否則包裹可能會寄錯地方。
questions.answer: You had better check the address before sending the parcel, or it may go to the wrong place.
questions.answerZh: 你最好在寄出包裹前核對地址，否則包裹可能會寄錯地方。
questions.highlight: You had better check the address before sending the parcel, or it may go to the wrong place.

questions.prompt: You look very thirsty. It would be wise to drink some water now.
questions.promptZh: 你看來非常口渴。現在喝點水會較明智。
questions.answer: You look very thirsty, so you had better drink some water now.
questions.answerZh: 你看來非常口渴，所以最好現在喝點水。
questions.highlight: You look very thirsty, so you had better drink some water now.

questions.prompt: Make sure you lock the door before you go out.
questions.promptZh: 外出前務必鎖好門。
questions.answer: You had better lock the door before you go out.
questions.answerZh: 你最好在外出前鎖好門。
questions.highlight: You had better lock the door before you go out.

questions.prompt: If you are still confused, the safest thing is to ask the teacher.
questions.promptZh: 如果你仍然感到困惑，最穩妥的做法是請教老師。
questions.answer: If you are still confused, you had better ask the teacher.
questions.answerZh: 如果你仍然感到困惑，最好請教老師。
questions.highlight: If you are still confused, you had better ask the teacher.

questions.prompt: Do not touch the pan because it is still very hot.
questions.promptZh: 不要觸碰平底鍋，因為它仍然很燙。
questions.answer: You had better not touch the pan because it is still very hot.
questions.answerZh: 你最好不要觸碰平底鍋，因為它仍然很燙。
questions.highlight: You had better not touch the pan because it is still very hot.

questions.prompt: Sam should set an alarm, or he may oversleep.
questions.promptZh: 森應該設定鬧鐘，否則他可能會睡過頭。
questions.answer: Sam had better set an alarm, or he may oversleep.
questions.answerZh: 森最好設定鬧鐘，否則他可能會睡過頭。
questions.highlight: Sam had better set an alarm, or he may oversleep.

questions.prompt: It would be wise for us to book the tickets today because prices may rise tomorrow.
questions.promptZh: 我們今天預訂門票會較明智，因為價格明天可能會上升。
questions.answer: We had better book the tickets today because prices may rise tomorrow.
questions.answerZh: 我們最好今天預訂門票，因為價格明天可能會上升。
questions.highlight: We had better book the tickets today because prices may rise tomorrow.

questions.prompt: Lily should save copies of her files in case her computer stops working.
questions.promptZh: 莉莉應該儲存檔案副本，以防電腦停止運作。
questions.answer: Lily had better save copies of her files in case her computer stops working.
questions.answerZh: 莉莉最好儲存檔案副本，以防電腦停止運作。
questions.highlight: Lily had better save copies of her files in case her computer stops working.

questions.prompt: You are strongly advised not to eat that yoghurt because it has expired.
questions.promptZh: 那杯乳酪已經過期，因此強烈建議你不要吃。
questions.answer: You had better not eat that yoghurt because it has expired.
questions.answerZh: 你最好不要吃那杯乳酪，因為它已經過期。
questions.highlight: You had better not eat that yoghurt because it has expired.

questions.prompt: The weather warning says the children should stay indoors until the storm passes.
questions.promptZh: 天氣警告指出，孩子們應該留在室內，直至暴風雨過去。
questions.answer: The children had better stay indoors until the storm passes.
questions.answerZh: 孩子們最好留在室內，直至暴風雨過去。
questions.highlight: The children had better stay indoors until the storm passes.

questions.prompt: It is important for me to reply to this email today, or the customer may think I ignored it.
questions.promptZh: 我今天回覆這封電郵十分重要，否則顧客可能會以為我沒有理會。
questions.answer: I had better reply to this email today, or the customer may think I ignored it.
questions.answerZh: 我最好今天回覆這封電郵，否則顧客可能會以為我沒有理會。
questions.highlight: I had better reply to this email today, or the customer may think I ignored it.

questions.prompt: Daniel has had a fever for three days. The sensible thing is for him to see a doctor.
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾已經發燒三天。明智的做法是去看醫生。
questions.answer: Daniel has had a fever for three days, so he had better see a doctor.
questions.answerZh: 丹尼爾已經發燒三天，所以最好去看醫生。
questions.highlight: Daniel has had a fever for three days, so he had better see a doctor.

questions.prompt: Why should you keep the receipt? You may need it if you return the item.
questions.promptZh: 你為甚麼應該保留收據？如果要退貨，你可能會需要它。
questions.answer: You had better keep the receipt because you may need it if you return the item.
questions.answerZh: 你最好保留收據，因為如果要退貨，你可能會需要它。
questions.highlight: You had better keep the receipt because you may need it if you return the item.

questions.prompt: Mia is very tired, so it would be unwise for her to drive tonight.
questions.promptZh: 米婭非常疲倦，所以她今晚駕駛並不明智。
questions.answer: Mia is very tired, so she had better not drive tonight.
questions.answerZh: 米婭非常疲倦，所以今晚最好不要駕駛。
questions.highlight: Mia is very tired, so she had better not drive tonight.

questions.prompt: The team should practise the presentation again, or the audience may not understand it.
questions.promptZh: 團隊應該再次練習簡報，否則觀眾可能無法明白內容。
questions.answer: The team had better practise the presentation again, or the audience may not understand it.
questions.answerZh: 團隊最好再次練習簡報，否則觀眾可能無法明白內容。
questions.highlight: The team had better practise the presentation again, or the audience may not understand it.

questions.prompt: We should take the earlier train, or we may not arrive before the meeting starts.
questions.promptZh: 我們應該乘搭較早的火車，否則可能無法在會議開始前到達。
questions.answer: We had better take the earlier train, or we may not arrive before the meeting starts.
questions.answerZh: 我們最好乘搭較早的火車，否則可能無法在會議開始前到達。
questions.highlight: We had better take the earlier train, or we may not arrive before the meeting starts.

questions.prompt: Oliver is strongly advised to bring his passport to the airport.
questions.promptZh: 強烈建議奧利弗帶同護照前往機場。
questions.answer: Oliver had better bring his passport to the airport.
questions.answerZh: 奧利弗最好帶同護照前往機場。
questions.highlight: Oliver had better bring his passport to the airport.

questions.prompt: Sharing that password would put your account at risk, so do not share it.
questions.promptZh: 分享那個密碼會令你的帳戶承受風險，所以不要分享它。
questions.answer: You had better not share that password because it would put your account at risk.
questions.answerZh: 你最好不要分享那個密碼，因為這樣會令你的帳戶承受風險。
questions.highlight: You had better not share that password because it would put your account at risk.

questions.prompt: The manager needs the report at one o’clock, so the wisest choice is for me to finish it before lunch.
questions.promptZh: 經理在一時需要這份報告，所以我最明智的選擇是在午飯前完成它。
questions.answer: I had better finish this report before lunch because the manager needs it at one o’clock.
questions.answerZh: 我最好在午飯前完成這份報告，因為經理在一時需要它。
questions.highlight: I had better finish this report before lunch because the manager needs it at one o’clock.

questions.prompt: The air quality is very poor today. Residents are strongly advised to close their windows.
questions.promptZh: 今天的空氣質素非常差。因此強烈建議居民關上窗戶。
questions.answer: The air quality is very poor today, so residents had better close their windows.
questions.answerZh: 今天的空氣質素非常差，所以居民最好關上窗戶。
questions.highlight: The air quality is very poor today, so residents had better close their windows.

questions.prompt: If Chloe ignores the warning light, the car may break down.
questions.promptZh: 如果克洛伊忽略警告燈，汽車可能會故障。
questions.answer: Chloe had better not ignore the warning light, or the car may break down.
questions.answerZh: 克洛伊最好不要忽略警告燈，否則汽車可能會故障。
questions.highlight: Chloe had better not ignore the warning light, or the car may break down.

questions.prompt: Why should we check the platform number again? The platform may have changed.
questions.promptZh: 我們為甚麼應該再次查看月台號碼？月台可能已經更改。
questions.answer: We had better check the platform number again because it may have changed.
questions.answerZh: 我們最好再次查看月台號碼，因為月台可能已經更改。
questions.highlight: We had better check the platform number again because it may have changed.

questions.prompt: The patient’s condition has suddenly become worse. The nurse should call the doctor immediately.
questions.promptZh: 病人的情況突然惡化。護士應該立即通知醫生。
questions.answer: The patient’s condition has suddenly become worse, so the nurse had better call the doctor immediately.
questions.answerZh: 病人的情況突然惡化，所以護士最好立即通知醫生。
questions.highlight: The patient’s condition has suddenly become worse, so the nurse had better call the doctor immediately.

questions.prompt: Some small shops do not accept credit cards, so it would be wise to keep some cash with you.
questions.promptZh: 有些小店不接受信用卡，所以隨身帶備一些現金會較明智。
questions.answer: Some small shops do not accept credit cards, so you had better keep some cash with you.
questions.answerZh: 有些小店不接受信用卡，所以你最好隨身帶備一些現金。
questions.highlight: Some small shops do not accept credit cards, so you had better keep some cash with you.

questions.prompt: The broken gate could injure someone. The school should repair it soon.
questions.promptZh: 損壞的閘門可能會令別人受傷。學校應該盡快修理它。
questions.answer: The school had better repair the broken gate soon because it could injure someone.
questions.answerZh: 學校最好盡快修理損壞的閘門，因為它可能會令別人受傷。
questions.highlight: The school had better repair the broken gate soon because it could injure someone.

questions.prompt: It would be unwise for Mark to post that photo online because it shows private information.
questions.promptZh: 那張相片顯示了私人資料，所以馬克把它上載到網上並不明智。
questions.answer: Mark had better not post that photo online because it shows private information.
questions.answerZh: 馬克最好不要把那張相片上載到網上，因為它顯示了私人資料。
questions.highlight: Mark had better not post that photo online because it shows private information.

questions.prompt: Several roads are closed because of the storm. The most sensible option is to move the meeting online.
questions.promptZh: 多條道路因暴風雨而封閉。最明智的選擇是把會議改為網上進行。
questions.answer: Several roads are closed because of the storm, so we had better move the meeting online.
questions.answerZh: 多條道路因暴風雨而封閉，所以我們最好把會議改為網上進行。
questions.highlight: Several roads are closed because of the storm, so we had better move the meeting online.

questions.prompt: Before you sign the contract, make sure you read every detail carefully.
questions.promptZh: 簽署合約前，務必仔細閱讀每一項細節。
questions.answer: You had better read every detail carefully before signing the contract.
questions.answerZh: 你最好在簽署合約前仔細閱讀每一項細節。
questions.highlight: You had better read every detail carefully before signing the contract.

questions.prompt: The hikers may be caught in the dark if they continue. The safest action is to turn back now.
questions.promptZh: 如果行山人士繼續前進，他們可能會在天黑後仍未離開。最穩妥的做法是現在折返。
questions.answer: The hikers had better turn back now, or they may be caught in the dark.
questions.answerZh: 行山人士最好現在折返，否則他們可能會在天黑後仍未離開。
questions.highlight: The hikers had better turn back now, or they may be caught in the dark.

questions.prompt: We still do not know when the parts will arrive, so it would be unwise for me to promise a delivery date yet.
questions.promptZh: 我們仍然不知道零件何時到達，所以我現在承諾送貨日期並不明智。
questions.answer: We still do not know when the parts will arrive, so I had better not promise a delivery date yet.
questions.answerZh: 我們仍然不知道零件何時到達，所以我最好暫時不要承諾送貨日期。
questions.highlight: We still do not know when the parts will arrive, so I had better not promise a delivery date yet.

questions.prompt: What is the best thing for Sofia to do? She should tell her parents the truth before they hear it from someone else.
questions.promptZh: 蘇菲亞最好怎樣做？她應該在父母從別人口中得知之前告訴他們真相。
questions.answer: Sofia had better tell her parents the truth before they hear it from someone else.
questions.answerZh: 蘇菲亞最好在父母從別人口中得知之前告訴他們真相。
questions.highlight: Sofia had better tell her parents the truth before they hear it from someone else.

questions.prompt: Children may cross the road without warning, so drivers are strongly advised to slow down near the school.
questions.promptZh: 孩子可能會在沒有預警下橫過馬路，所以強烈建議駕駛者在學校附近減速。
questions.answer: Children may cross the road without warning, so drivers had better slow down near the school.
questions.answerZh: 孩子可能會在沒有預警下橫過馬路，所以駕駛者最好在學校附近減速。
questions.highlight: Children may cross the road without warning, so drivers had better slow down near the school.

questions.prompt: The email came from an unknown sender. Do not open the attachment because it may contain a virus.
questions.promptZh: 這封電郵來自不明寄件人。不要開啟附件，因為當中可能含有電腦病毒。
questions.answer: The email came from an unknown sender, so you had better not open the attachment because it may contain a virus.
questions.answerZh: 這封電郵來自不明寄件人，所以你最好不要開啟附件，因為當中可能含有電腦病毒。
questions.highlight: The email came from an unknown sender, so you had better not open the attachment because it may contain a virus.

questions.prompt: More guests may come than expected, so the organisers should prepare extra chairs.
questions.promptZh: 出席的賓客可能比預期多，所以主辦單位應該準備額外座椅。
questions.answer: The organisers had better prepare extra chairs because more guests may come than expected.
questions.answerZh: 主辦單位最好準備額外座椅，因為出席的賓客可能比預期多。
questions.highlight: The organisers had better prepare extra chairs because more guests may come than expected.

questions.prompt: It is important for us to write down the confirmation number in case we need to contact the hotel.
questions.promptZh: 我們記下確認編號十分重要，以備需要聯絡酒店時使用。
questions.answer: We had better write down the confirmation number in case we need to contact the hotel.
questions.answerZh: 我們最好記下確認編號，以備需要聯絡酒店時使用。
questions.highlight: We had better write down the confirmation number in case we need to contact the hotel.

questions.prompt: The faulty lift is causing long delays, and patients may be put at risk. The hospital should replace it quickly.
questions.promptZh: 故障的升降機造成長時間延誤，也可能令病人承受風險。醫院應該盡快更換它。
questions.answer: The faulty lift is causing long delays and may put patients at risk, so the hospital had better replace it quickly.
questions.answerZh: 故障的升降機造成長時間延誤，也可能令病人承受風險，所以醫院最好盡快更換它。
questions.highlight: The faulty lift is causing long delays and may put patients at risk, so the hospital had better replace it quickly.

questions.prompt: It would be unwise to rely on one source alone because it may contain an error.
questions.promptZh: 只依靠一個資料來源並不明智，因為當中可能有錯誤。
questions.answer: You had better not rely on one source alone because it may contain an error.
questions.answerZh: 你最好不要只依靠一個資料來源，因為當中可能有錯誤。
questions.highlight: You had better not rely on one source alone because it may contain an error.

questions.prompt: If our company changes the service without warning customers, many of them may complain.
questions.promptZh: 如果本公司在沒有通知顧客的情況下更改服務，很多顧客可能會投訴。
questions.answer: Our company had better inform customers before changing the service, or many of them may complain.
questions.answerZh: 本公司最好在更改服務前通知顧客，否則很多顧客可能會投訴。
questions.highlight: Our company had better inform customers before changing the service, or many of them may complain.

questions.prompt: Ben is strongly advised to keep the medicine away from children.
questions.promptZh: 強烈建議本把藥物放在兒童接觸不到的地方。
questions.answer: Ben had better keep the medicine away from children.
questions.answerZh: 本最好把藥物放在兒童接觸不到的地方。
questions.highlight: Ben had better keep the medicine away from children.

questions.prompt: The damaged road is becoming more dangerous, so the council is strongly advised not to delay the repairs any longer.
questions.promptZh: 受損道路正變得更加危險，所以強烈建議市政當局不要再拖延維修。
questions.answer: The damaged road is becoming more dangerous, so the council had better not delay the repairs any longer.
questions.answerZh: 受損道路正變得更加危險，所以市政當局最好不要再拖延維修。
questions.highlight: The damaged road is becoming more dangerous, so the council had better not delay the repairs any longer.

questions.prompt: Why is it important for us to copy every signed document? We may need proof later.
questions.promptZh: 我們為甚麼應該為每份已簽署的文件保留副本？我們日後可能需要證明。
questions.answer: We had better make a copy of every signed document because we may need proof later.
questions.answerZh: 我們最好為每份已簽署的文件保留副本，因為日後可能需要證明。
questions.highlight: We had better make a copy of every signed document because we may need proof later.

questions.prompt: Several players are injured. If the coach continues with the same training plan, more players may get hurt.
questions.promptZh: 數名球員已經受傷。如果教練繼續採用相同的訓練計劃，可能會有更多球員受傷。
questions.answer: Several players are injured, so the coach had better change the training plan before more players get hurt.
questions.answerZh: 數名球員已經受傷，所以教練最好在更多球員受傷前更改訓練計劃。
questions.highlight: Several players are injured, so the coach had better change the training plan before more players get hurt.

questions.prompt: A telephone call may not be enough. The safest choice is to confirm the cancellation in writing.
questions.promptZh: 單靠電話通知可能不足夠。最穩妥的做法是以書面確認取消安排。
questions.answer: A telephone call may not be enough, so you had better confirm the cancellation in writing.
questions.answerZh: 單靠電話通知可能不足夠，所以你最好以書面確認取消安排。
questions.highlight: A telephone call may not be enough, so you had better confirm the cancellation in writing.

questions.prompt: The figures have not been checked fully, so the research team is strongly advised not to publish the results yet.
questions.promptZh: 數據尚未經過全面核對，所以強烈建議研究團隊暫時不要公布結果。
questions.answer: The figures have not been checked fully, so the research team had better not publish the results yet.
questions.answerZh: 數據尚未經過全面核對，所以研究團隊最好暫時不要公布結果。
questions.highlight: The figures have not been checked fully, so the research team had better not publish the results yet.

questions.prompt: Residents have reported cracks in several walls. The building manager should arrange an urgent inspection before the problem becomes more serious.
questions.promptZh: 居民報告數面牆壁出現裂縫。大廈經理應該在問題變得更嚴重前安排緊急檢查。
questions.answer: Residents have reported cracks in several walls, so the building manager had better arrange an urgent inspection before the problem becomes more serious.
questions.answerZh: 居民報告數面牆壁出現裂縫，所以大廈經理最好在問題變得更嚴重前安排緊急檢查。
questions.highlight: Residents have reported cracks in several walls, so the building manager had better arrange an urgent inspection before the problem becomes more serious.
